sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50763" key="i(ppoka/mpion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱππο-κάμπιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱππόκαμπος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">115</biblScope></bibl>. <sense n="II" id="n50763.0" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> a kind of <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ear-ring</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:97" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.97</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
